rulings.Case Title: GARY TSIFRIN ET AL VS. IAN DUGGAN ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Dismiss Or In The Alternative Stay Petition To Confirm Arbitration
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday June 21, 2018 line 1. RESPONDENT IAN DUGGAN, DAPHNE WONG Notice Of Motion To Dismiss Or In The Alternative Stay Petition To Confirm Arbitration GRANTED. This action is stayed until related action is resolved in arbitration. Wong shall file response within 10 days of this order. Respondents to prepare order. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Confirm Arbitration Award And Obtain Judgment On Award
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday June 21, 2018 line 1. PETITIONER GARY TSIFRIN, FRANCESCA WONG-TSIFRIN, JEFF WINTER, CLAUDIA WINTER, FRANCESCA WONG Notice Of Motion And Motion To Confirm Arbitration Award And Obtain Judgment On Award DENIED. Respondents to prepare order. = (501/REQ)
